pages.title: Welcome & Key Features
pages.content:
Welcome to VeloHelp - a simple and powerful system designed to make your daily work easier.

Key Features
  • Easy to use interface
  • Role-based access
  • Quick workflows
  • Helpful troubleshooting tips

faq.a: All team members with proper login.

pages.title: Add New Employee
pages.content:
Step-by-step guide:
  1. Go to Employee menu
  2. Click Add New
  3. Fill the form
  4. Click Save

faq.q: What if I make a mistake?
faq.a: You can edit the record anytime.
